title: Statue of Liberty - New York City - Tour and Review
content:
Statue of Liberty - New York City - Tour and Review
Let's Go See It
11300 subscribers
9 likes
508 views
26 Feb 2026
Join me as I take you on a full tour of the Statue of Liberty and Ellis Island – two of the most iconic landmarks in the United States! In this video, we’ll cover everything you need to know about visiting Lady Liberty and the Ellis Island Immigration Museum, from ferry tickets and security checks to climbing the pedestal, exploring the grounds, and learning the history behind these world-famous attractions.

We’ll walk you through the Statue of Liberty National Monument, show you the best photo spots, and give you tips on how to make the most of your trip. Then, we head over to Ellis Island, where millions of immigrants entered America, and explore the museum exhibits, artifacts, and stories that shaped U.S. history.

Whether you’re planning a trip to New York City or just want to see what it’s like to visit, this full guide has you covered. From Battery Park ferry rides to the New Jersey Liberty State Park departure point, I’ll share insider tips, ticket options (general admission, pedestal access, crown tickets), and must-see highlights.

What you’ll see in this video:

Statue of Liberty ferry ride experience
Inside the Statue of Liberty pedestal & museum
Ellis Island Immigration Museum tour
Tips for visiting with kids & families
How long the trip takes and the best times to go
Historical facts about the Statue of Liberty & Ellis Island

If you’re visiting NYC, this is one of the top attractions you can’t miss. Perfect for history lovers, travelers, and anyone looking to experience the best things to do in New York City!

title: NYC Observation deck: Visiting The Summit at One Vanderbilt in 2026 — The Empty Nest Explorers
content: # NYC Observation deck: Visiting The Summit at One Vanderbilt in 2026. **The Summit at One Vanderbilt** is the newest and most unique observation deck in New York City. Nothing quite beats seeing the city from above, and while there are a number of other classic New York observation decks, One Vanderbilt has stirred up quite a social media buzz. So we were excited to experience it. *In this post, we share information on planning your visit, ideas on what to expect, and our own impressions of the Summit at One Vanderbilt.*. Timelapse of the Summit at One Vanderbilt observation deck. 🏙️ Summit at One Vanderbilt: Quick Facts. Access to the Summit is through **Grand Central Terminal** at the Vanderbilt passage. It’s not too easy to find, so best bet, look for someone in uniform and ask, even if that means squelching your husband’s aversion to asking directions ;) It will save you a lot of wandering around.
